_comment: Reusable values for UI-validation checks (Playwright POM). Secrets live in config/ui_config.json. Re-pointed to nbr-84 (NBR 11.2.1) 2026-07-06; new FLB wizard has 6 steps (Source/Inclusion/Exclusion/Destination/Schedule/Options) and item selection happens on the Source step via a per-machine Select Items dialog.

appliance.role: File-Level Backup (FLB). File Share Backup is on nbr-5 / 10.10.15.5.

login.note: login fields unchanged on 11.2.1; verified live 2026-07-06

navigation.flb_menu_item: File level backup for physical machine
navigation._status: verified live 2026-07-06 (create '+' opens the job menu; FLB item label exact)

linux.note: holds /TestData_ForFLB (341 files; differs from old set)

repository.name: Onboard repository
repository.note: fast local repo (id 2); NFS_REPO (id 7) also OK; CIFS_REPO id 3 is INACCESSIBLE

wizard_labels.select_at_least_one: Select at least one item on the left
wizard_labels.do_not_schedule: Do not schedule, run on demand

backup_copy._status: CALIBRATED live 2026-07-08 against nbr-84 (New Backup Copy Job Wizard, 4 steps: Backups/Destination/Schedule/Options)
backup_copy.source_backup_group_label: File level backup job for physical machine
backup_copy._source_note: the UI-visible leaf name for BACKUP_OBJECT-8 (linux-src's FLB backup) in the Backups-step existing-backups tree; a leaf suffixed '(inaccessible)' (e.g. 'Windown (inaccessible)') must NOT be picked
backup_copy._repository_note: pick any repo other than the source's own onboard repo; use immutable_repository (an *_Immutable repo, objectLockSupported:true) to exercise the 'Immutable for' checkbox — it is disabled on non-Object-Lock repos

NJM-122652.title: Prevent proceeding with no item selected
NJM-122652.at: Source step, machine selected but no item picked
NJM-122652.expect: 'Next' does NOT advance (item selection gated); right panel shows 'No item(s) selected'

NJM-122653.title: Next proceeds after item selection
NJM-122653.at: Source step, after selecting >=1 item in Select Items
NJM-122653.expect: machine row shows 'N item(s) are selected'; Next advances to '2. Inclusion'

NJM-122651.title: Selection of folder + file item types
NJM-122651.expect: can tick a FOLDER and an individual FILE; footer 'Selected for Physical Machine: 2'
